name: Volcengine Ark (Coding Plan)
description: Coding Plan–only endpoints (/api/coding…). Do not mix with the standard /api/v3 base URL or plan quota will not apply. See Volcengine official docs.

name: Volcengine Ark (Agent Plan)
description: Agent Plan–only endpoints (/api/plan…). Do not mix with the standard /api/v3 base URL or plan quota will not apply. See Volcengine official docs.

name: Alibaba Cloud Bailian (Coding Plan)
description: Coding Plan–only endpoints and plan keys (sk-sp-*), separate from pay-as-you-go compatible-mode. See Alibaba Cloud "Coding Plan tool integration" docs.

name: Tencent TokenHub (Hy Token Plan)
description: Hy Token Plan personal subscription endpoints (/plan/v3, /plan/anthropic). Shares the same API key (sk-tp-*) as the general Token Plan; usage is deducted from the Hy plan bundle by model ID (hy3, hy3-preview). Do not mix with pay-as-you-go tokenhub.tencentmaas.com/v1 or legacy api.hunyuan.cloud.tencent.com. See TokenHub "Token Plan personal edition" docs.

name: Zhipu GLM (Coding Plan)
description: GLM Coding Plan OpenAI base URL; Anthropic base URL for tools such as Claude Code. Do not mix with the general /api/paas/v4 path.

name: Z.AI GLM (International)
description: Z.AI international OpenAI-compatible base URL (api.z.ai); pay-as-you-go API key. China-region users should use the Zhipu GLM template (open.bigmodel.cn) instead.

name: Z.AI GLM (Coding Plan)
description: GLM Coding Plan international endpoints (api.z.ai); Anthropic base URL for tools such as Claude Code. Do not mix with the general /api/paas/v4 path or plan quota will not apply. See Z.AI developer docs.

name: Meituan LongCat
description: Dual OpenAI- and Anthropic-compatible endpoints; upstream model IDs such as LongCat-2.0. See longcat.chat platform docs.

name: Kimi Code (Coding API)
description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for Kimi Code CLI / Coding plan (api.kimi.com), separate from the standard moonshot.cn platform. See Kimi Code CLI docs (platform & models).

name: Anthropic
description: Root URL has no path suffix; the gateway appends `/v1/messages`. See Anthropic console docs.

name: Google Gemini (Generative Language API)
description: Developer API: native Gemini base includes `/v1beta/models` (`key=`); OpenAI-compatible base includes `/v1beta/openai` (Bearer). See ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/openai.

name: Google Vertex AI (Express Mode · API Key)
description: Vertex Express: base includes the full prefix `/v1/publishers/google/models` (use `.../v1beta1/publishers/google/models` for v1beta1). API key via `key=`; no project/location/OAuth required. Express has no official OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

name: Perplexity
description: OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions; base path per Perplexity official docs.

name: Cohere (OpenAI Compatibility)
description: Uses the Cohere Compatibility API (OpenAI SDK migration path). See Cohere docs compatibility section.

name: NVIDIA NIM (integrate.api)
description: Common NIM OpenAI-compatible entry point; models and regions per NVIDIA Build / NGC docs.

name: Azure OpenAI (replace resource name)
description: Replace YOUR_RESOURCE_NAME with your Azure portal OpenAI resource name; deployment paths and `api-version` per Microsoft official docs.

name: StepFun
description: OpenAI-compatible entry point; other product lines such as Step Plan may use different base URLs—see StepFun platform docs.

name: Xiaomi MiMo
description: OpenAI-compatible entry point; host and path per latest Xiaomi MiMo platform docs.

name: Xiaomi MiMo (Token Plan)
description: Xiaomi MiMo Token Plan OpenAI-compatible base URL; Anthropic base URL for tools such as Claude Code. Do not mix with the general API endpoint.

name: Ollama (Local)
description: Default local Ollama OpenAI-compatible base URL; for remote or container deployments, change to the reachable `http(s)://host:port/v1`.
